case_title: RICHARDSON, DENNIS VS BHAKTA, BARRY DBA S.G. BHAKTA AND SONS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RICHARDSON, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT BHAKTA, BARRY DBA S.G. BHAKTA AND SONS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
